subcodes.first_line: The Hidden One beareth witness unto My Name, the Self-Subsisting, that verily there is no God but Me, the Almighty, the Best-Beloved. The Treasured One beareth witness thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المکنون لاسمی القیوم انه لا اله الا انا العزیز المحبوب شهد المخزون و انه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @consolation and comfort
